Meets & Events

Stay up to date with track meets, competitions, and community events from Lansing Area Track Club.

Event Types: meetpracticecommunityfundraiserother
practice Featured

Summer Training Kickoff

Meet the coaches, learn the season plan, and start summer training with Lansing Area Track Club.

Monday, July 6, 2026 5:00 PM Sexton High School Track
meet

Lansing Community Track Meet

A local meet opportunity for youth athletes to compete, learn, and represent LATC.

Friday, July 17, 2026 9:00 AM Lansing, Michigan
fundraiser

Juneteenth 5K Planning Night

Volunteer and sponsor planning meeting for the Lansing Juneteenth 5K Run/Walk/Roll.

Sunday, August 2, 2026 6:00 PM Lansing, Michigan

Join the Team

Lansing Area

Track Club

Helping youth athletes in Lansing, Michigan build speed, endurance, confidence, and discipline through track, running, and community since 2015.

Serving Lansing, East Lansing, Okemos, Holt, Waverly, Delta Township and surrounding Mid-Michigan communities.
